fields.title: agents: ignore completed Ralph loops when computing session restrictions
fields.description: Agent enablement should not inherit Ralph allowlist from completed loop state files. Today agents-menu/state.ts scans .pi/ralph/state and treats any loop owning the session file as Ralph-owned, even when the loop status is completed, so sessions keep seeing 'Ralph policy active' and some agents stay unavailable after /ralph stop. Reproduce with a completed loop whose controller session matches the visible session, then inspect /agents or isDisabledForSession.
